UI/UX Specification ### Layout Structure - Single window application (800x600 default, resizable min 600x500) - Header: app title and mode tabs - Main content: input area + operation controls + results - Footer: version info, optional history toggle ### Visual Design - **Color Palette**: - Background: #1a1a2e (dark navy) - Surface: #16213e (slightly lighter) - Primary accent: #0f3460 (deep blue) - Action: #e94560 (coral red) - Text primary: #eaeaea - Text secondary: #a0a0a0 - Success: #4ecca3 (mint green) - **Typography**: - Font: "JetBrains Mono", "Consolas", monospace - Heading: 18px bold - Body: 14px regular - Numbers/Results: 16px medium - **Spacing**: 8px base unit; 16px component gaps - **Visual Effects**: subtle box-shadow on cards, smooth tab transitions ### Components - **Mode Tabs**: Fractions | GCD-LCM | Prime Check | Factorize | Generate - **Input Fields**: Labeled numeric inputs with validation - **Operation Buttons**: Primary action buttons per mode - **Results Panel**: Formatted output with optional step display - **History Sidebar** (toggle): last 10 calculations ## 3.
